LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD CONTINUED FROM MAR-15-2022 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-12-2022, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. PURSUANT TO EX PARTE HEARING ON FEB-25-2022, IN THE MATTER OF CGC-22-598216 BONDS LANDS INVESTMENT CP., LTD V. JOHNSON CHAN, (RE: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER) JUDGE SUZANNE BOLANOS MAKES A BENCH RULING FOR PLAINTIFFS PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD TO BE CONTINUED TO APR-12-2022. ALL PARTIES PRESENT AGREE TO THE CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL IN CGC-22-598216 TO GIVE NOTICE OF THIS CONTINUANCE TO COUNSEL. THE EX PARTE HEARING IN THE MATTER OF CGC-22-598216 BONDS LAND INVESTMENT CP., LTD V. JOHNSON CHAN WAS REPORTED BY RYAN WHEELER, CSR# 13717, COURT REPORTER, APTUS COURT REPORTING, (619) 546-9151.
